Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to examine activities Verify Documents appears multiple times in each case and Call Customer appears multiple times within the same case in C002

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In C001 first verification is before missing docs then after Submit Additional the second verification is a re check and in C003 the second verification happens after Adjust Account so it is also a re verification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Initiate Request appears once per case Submit Additional appears only in C001 Adjust Account appears once per case and Approve Request appears once per case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus repeated activities Verify Documents and Call Customer should be renamed based on contextual purpose and process position

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Potential naming Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification also Call Customer Initial and Call Customer Follow up or more specific purpose based names

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The first call in C001 is to request missing docs in C002 the first call is to clarify discrepancy and the second call is to confirm adjustments and in C003 the call is to have the customer return

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So each call can have a descriptive suffix indicating purpose such as Request Missing Info Clarify Discrepancy Confirm Adjustment and Recall Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The revised event log renames C001 Verify Documents to Initial then Re verification C002 Call Customer to Clarify Discrepancy then Confirm Adjustment and C003 Verify Documents to Initial then Re verification
